title: Bone Tools
description: Adds some basic tools made with bone. Dagger, Sword and Axe does extra damage to skeletons.
body:
This is a mod that i made that adds some tools that work like iron but is cheaper because they are made of bones. But there are way too many recipes just for four tools. Here are the crafting table recipes first.

![Recipe for Dagger Weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/962384958d361cd6913811e7ac736901cd3db12a.png)

![Recipe for Bone Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bd5fecad2f4c8a48dabb40bec442ff68a91f01e.png)

![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b8d7469b0330a21e0ed689598088076b6c550e2.png)
![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab14287fefc2946351689ee18e01d16eb3af439.png)
![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/012a1ce7b23c051b2b6b012550db6d2e0bca9f11.png)
![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e940db93bcc40cb004d8d4cc8eb5e2a519f099b7.png)
![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/866a73d5c81d4b49ad40b1e8b468d5370f2490bc.png)
![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4759372916acfd3753d7acfea6a3b572002ec83.gif)
![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99986167a9dc55ea3da5e36579bc0cf761ccf097.gif)
![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91f40cb1612e1b44bbab0786db74ca38e0939a84.png)
![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfa5904cbbce2cb4f4c98950c1a185540624b416.png)

Now the stone cutter recipes.

![Recipe for Glass Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62438812a50eb1545f0c0c5f02164bb9557fb036.png)
![Recipe for Bone Powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec2bde942f695e16b8e400df00a800315a89adf.png)
![Recipe for Sharpened Flint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b378b6a5eeccb2c6be710251088bb214c2d4b43.png)

The sharpened flint can be used 4 times before it breaks.\

This mod though it is simple has stupidly weird crafting recipes and took me some time to make so I would be honored for you guys to download it. And it is open sourced so here is the github page for it.
https://github.com/StonedBlocks/bone-tools-template-1.20.1
